kits.kit_identity_narrative: A swift, dexterous frontline fighter who channels fire into broad sweeping strikes, burning across the battlefield line with the same unyielding ground-holding presence that defines the Ironfield Wardens. Their high-tempo melee cadence trades elemental wind and holy breadth for searing flat-damage pressure, scorching the forward arc where the Wardens plant their feet.
A shadow-aligned fighter bearer from the fantasy-generic lineage of the Ironfield Wardens faction, whose identity was substrate-derived after LLM naming failed.

A swift-handed melee fighter whose DEX-driven tempo sustains relentless wide-arc wind strikes across open ground, this Warden presses the front line with flat, unyielding cadence rather than bursts of peak force. Their footwork and blade-wind carry the Ironfield's elemental breadth into close quarters, holding contested earth through constant forward motion.

Where the faction's broad-front line holds against fire and shadow, this warden turns shadow inward — channeling INT-driven dark resonance through melee sweeps that hit at sustained flat amplitude, wearing down resistance rather than spiking through it. High tempo keeps the pressure unrelenting, a grim counterweight to the faction's holy and wind flanks.

A melee combatant who channels water's weight into sweeping close-range strikes, this Warden presses the battle line with relentless flat-tempo aggression, reading the field through INT-driven awareness rather than brute instinct. Water's give-and-return quality extends the faction's elemental breadth, flooding gaps in the front with fluid, wide-arc force.

A melee-range combatant who channels lightning through broad, sweeping strikes, this Warden converts raw INT-driven voltage into wide-arc pressure that cracks armor and staggers lines without relenting. True to the Ironfield's elemental generalism, the Stormwright holds ground not through precision but through sustained electrical force layered over the faction's earthen resilience.

A front-line enforcer who drives into melee with relentless STR-driven momentum, trading finesse for flat, punishing output that wears down enemy lines through sustained physical pressure. Rooted in the Wardens' broad-front doctrine, this fighter holds the center by sheer force of body, letting elemental breadth in the ranks cover what precision cannot.

A high-tempo STR-driven melee striker who closes ground with sustained flat-damage pressure, this warden channels physical force through broad sweeping blows that hold the front line without relying on elemental augmentation. Their east-asian martial discipline sharpens the faction's earthen endurance into relentless forward momentum, denying footholds through sheer strike volume.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Ironfield Warden of the Ashened March
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A STR-driven melee combatant who sustains relentless high-tempo pressure across the front line, this Warden channels raw physical force into wide sweeping strikes that grind down opposition through endurance rather than finesse. Their flat amplitude output reflects the faction's doctrine of holding ground through sheer bodily dominance, with no elemental augment needed when iron discipline and reach suffice.

A melee fighter who channels wind energy through unpredictable, high-tempo strikes, this Warden reads the battlefield through instinct and wisdom rather than rote pattern, pressing wide-arc pressure across shifting engagements. Their variable cadence makes them difficult to anchor against, holding ground for the Ironfield line through elemental disruption rather than brute repetition.

A WIS-driven melee striker whose holy-channeled strikes land in surging, variable bursts — sometimes measured, sometimes overwhelming — pressing the forward line with the Ironfield's characteristic wide-arc force. Where others hold ground through endurance, this Warden holds it through consecrated disruption, reading the fight's rhythm and breaking it at close range.

Where the Ironfield Wardens press forward in broad formation, this warden anchors the advance through earth-channeled WIS — reading terrain and elemental pressure to unleash variable melee arcs that buckle lines before the main front arrives. High-tempo strikes drawn from deep ground-sense make each engagement a matter of footing denied and resolve broken.

A heavy-footed skirmisher who anchors the warband's front edge, trading the ranged chain-strikes of their kin for deliberate, bone-rattling blows that detonate in sudden bursts of raw physical force. Their slow cadence is a trap — the Scattered Wind holds its breath, then the Galebreaker exhales all at once.

Among the Ironfield Wardens, this fighter holds the forward line through sheer accumulated weight — slow to commit, but each strike lands with enough force to buckle shields and break formation gaps wide open. No elemental overlay sharpens the blow; the physical mass alone is the weapon.

A slow-building STR combatant who plants deep in the melee line and delivers crushing spiky bursts of physical force, this Warden holds the front through raw earthen weight rather than elemental flourish. Each strike lands infrequently but decisively, anchoring the faction's broad-front pressure where the ground itself seems to buckle.

A STR-driven melee combatant whose variable amplitude cuts carve wide swaths through enemy formations, pressing the Ironfield Wardens' broad-front doctrine with raw physical force rather than elemental augmentation. Medium tempo keeps engagements deliberate — each strike measured to hold ground and deny retreat rather than chase fleeting openings.

A STR-driven melee combatant whose variable amplitude cuts sweep broad arcs across contested ground, pressing forward with the Ironfield Wardens' signature wide-front force. Where tempo falters, this warden holds the line through raw physical weight, turning each measured exchange into a grinding assertion of earthen dominance.
A physical-aligned fighter bearer from the fantasy-generic lineage of the Ironfield Wardens faction, whose identity was substrate-derived after LLM naming failed.

A measured close-quarters warden who reads the wind's shifting pressure to widen each strike's arc, converting battlefield intuition into variable bursts of elemental force. Thornfeld-trained and wisdom-tempered, this fighter holds the line through broad elemental sweeps rather than precise thrusts, embodying the Ironfield Wardens' doctrine of presence over precision.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Fieldstone Arbiter of the Furrow Line
kits.kit_identity_narrative: Where the Ironfield Wardens hold ground through elemental breadth, this combatant anchors the front through measured earth-weight — reading the packed terrain beneath each engagement to modulate strike force across wide arcs. Wisdom-keyed and unhurried, the Arbiter lets the settling ground itself dictate when pressure becomes decisive.

A WIS-driven melee combatant whose variable strikes channel holy energy through wide sweeping forms drawn from east asian martial tradition, reinforcing the Wardens' broad-front pressure with consecrated force that shifts weight and tempo to hold contested ground. Where others in the faction rely on elemental breadth through physical mass, this keeper reads the field through disciplined awareness, converting spiritual attunement into close-range surges that punish any shadow or fire that breaks the line.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Dextrous Warden of the Pale Crossing
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A swift mid-range enforcer who channels holy energy through rapid, flat-tempo strikes, this Warden holds the line with agile footwork rather than brute weight. Their broad-front pressure keeps enemies off-balance across the engagement arc, carrying the Ironfield's elemental resilience forward through speed and sanctified reach.

Where the Wardens hold the line through elemental breadth, this shadow-attuned skirmisher threads the mid-range with quick, flat-tempo feints — DEX-driven disruption that bleeds pressure into enemy flanks without breaking the faction's broad-front grip. The shadow element here is not a departure from the Warden creed but a dimming of the battlefield's edges, keeping opponents uncertain while the wider line advances.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Ashfield Warden of the Cinder March
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A swift-footed line-holder who channels fire across mid-range sweeps, this Warden converts dexterous footwork into sustained heat pressure that scorches the ground between advancing ranks. Where the faction's elemental breadth usually leans on wind and holy force, the Cinder March fighter carries the faction's earthen resilience forward on a bed of controlled flame.

A deliberate, water-attuned skirmisher who reads the battlefield in slow pulses before releasing sudden surges of hydromantic force — bursts that scatter opponents the way wind breaks a wave across shallowed ground. Within the Scattered Wind Skirmishers, this kit holds the flanking line through patience and spike, not sustained pressure.

A mid-range intelligence-driven fighter whose fire bursts erupt in unpredictable spikes between long lulls, forcing opponents to hold their footing rather than press forward. True to the Ironfield Wardens, this combatant anchors ground through elemental breadth, trading wind and holy familiarity for scorched-earth pressure that punishes overextension.

Where the Wardens hold the line with blade and earthen will, this fighter channels lightning in measured, punishing bursts — slow to wind up but devastating when the charge breaks, forcing opponents to respect the open ground rather than press through it. The spiky INT cadence suits a combatant who reads the field before striking, using wide-arc threat presence to set up the moment the storm lands.
A holy-aligned fighter bearer from the fantasy-generic lineage of the Ironfield Wardens faction, whose identity was substrate-derived after LLM naming failed.

A mid-range sentinel whose wind-channeled strikes sweep in variable arcs, pressing forward lines with elemental breadth rather than targeted precision. Wisdom-tempered and unhurried, this Warden reads the field's shifting pressure before committing force, holding the Ironfield line through measured elemental reach.

Drawing on earth-attuned wisdom rather than raw aggression, this Warden reads the shifting weight of a battle line and adjusts strike amplitude accordingly — pressing wide when the ground allows, absorbing when it does not. The Loamwall's endgame presence is felt less through speed than through the accumulated pressure of a fighter who has not yielded a step.

A dexterous ranged skirmisher who holds the Ironfield line from distance, loosing swift flat-arc volleys that carry earth's weight into the wide front the Wardens press across contested ground. High-tempo and unhurried in equal measure, this warden reads the field's breadth and answers with strikes that pin rather than pierce.

A fleet-footed ranged striker who threads fire across the Ironfield Wardens' broad engagements, loosing rapid volleys that scorch the flanks while the line holds center. DEX-driven and relentless in tempo, this warden converts elemental fire into sustained field pressure rather than singular detonation.

A ranged enforcer who channels holy energy in measured, unrelenting volleys across open ground, the Arbiter of the Pale Reach sustains forward pressure where the Ironfield Wardens' line must hold widest. High in reflex and even in output, this warden denies ground through disciplined holy fire rather than sudden force.

A patient skirmisher who holds position at the warband's outer edge, releasing rare but punishing strikes timed to gaps in enemy footing rather than any sustained barrage. Their physical force lands like a thrown stone from an unseen angle — low cadence, high consequence, no arcane flourish required.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Gust Rover of the Fallow Ridge
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient skirmisher who holds position at the warband's outer edge, releasing sudden wind-driven volleys that strike hard and vanish before any counter-pressure can form. Her tempo is deceptive — long silences punctuated by bursts that scatter the enemy's geometric footing.

Where the Ironfield Wardens hold the line with broad elemental force, this sentinel fights from the edge of engagement — loosing shadow-charged strikes in sharp, measured bursts that exploit gaps torn open by the faction's wide-front pressure. Low tempo masks a predatory patience: each release lands with spiky, decisive weight when the battlefield finally tilts.

A deliberate fire-touched skirmisher who holds position at range, releasing infrequent but punishing bursts of flame that scatter across the battlefield in unpredictable arcs. Within the warband's loose geometry, this kit operates as a slow-trigger spike — patient until the moment the line breaks, then devastating.

Where the Wardens press forward on broad earthen lines, this ranged intelligence-bearer holds the rear flank, loosing infrequent but devastating lightning arcs that punish clustered enemy formations attempting to break the line. Each discharge is deliberate — low in tempo, high in consequence — threading elemental voltage through the faction's wider wind-and-holy pressure to shock any shadow-touched advance before it can consolidate.

Where the Wardens hold the line through broad elemental force, this ranged intelligence draws on water's patient pressure — unleashing slow-building surges that crest without warning, flooding enemy positions with cold elemental weight rather than steel. The Tidecaller anchors the faction's far flank, trading the ground-holding mass of close-quarters comrades for deliberate, high-amplitude water strikes that punish overextension.

A deliberate ranged striker who holds position far back in the skirmish line, releasing infrequent but punishing physical blows timed to collapse an opponent's footing rather than sustain pressure. Their role in the warband is geometric — they choose the angle, not the pace.

Where the Ironfield Wardens press forward on the ground, this warden holds the outer distance — drawing on raw physical force to deliver slow, crushing strikes that buckle enemy formations before the line ever closes. Low in cadence but punishing at the peak, the Fieldbreaker anchors the faction's broad-front pressure from beyond the melee threshold.

A heavy-limbed ranged striker who anchors the Ironfield Wardens' wide-front line, hurling concentrated physical force in punishing volleys that land infrequently but reshape the ground where they fall. Their slow cadence is doctrine, not weakness — each release timed to crack enemy footing and open the flanks for the close-quarters press that follows.

A patient earth-attuned skirmisher who holds the warband's flank by reading terrain fractures, releasing concentrated bursts of stone-scatter at low cadence to punish clustered advances. Their wisdom-driven timing slots into the Scattered Wind's chain-striking geometry as a delayed anchor — slow to commit, brutal when the ground finally gives.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Vigil Keeper of the Pale Drift
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient ranged fighter who holds the warband's flank with infrequent but decisive holy-struck volleys, timing each release to the gaps between enemy formations rather than sustaining a rhythm. Their wisdom-read of the field shapes where the Scattered Wind opens and where it closes.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Gale Seer of the Broken Reach
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A wind-attuned skirmisher who reads the battlefield in long silences and releases devastating ranged bursts at unpredictable intervals, her WIS-driven timing making her strikes land where the warband's geometry demands rather than where instinct would suggest. She holds position at the outer edge of the formation, a patient node in the Scattered Wind's chain-striking web.

A light-footed INT-channeling sentinel who reads the shifting boundary where shadow bleeds into water, this warden projects variable-arc suppression across mid-range engagements — dimming sight lines and flooding approach corridors in the same measured breath. Where others commit to a fixed strike, the Duskwarden holds tempo in reserve, adjusting arc geometry until the field collapses inward on itself.

A variable-tempo ranged controller who reads the tide's pull before releasing wide-arc water surges that blind and scatter grouped targets across contested ground. Her light footprint and INT-driven cadence let her reposition between volleys, sustaining the Wardens' doctrine of suppression without ever anchoring to a fixed line.

Where the Ironfield Wardens press forward on broad fronts, this ranged intelligence draws fire across wide arcs to scorch the ground ahead of the advance, variable bursts timed to medium tempo so the line never outpaces its own cover. Earthen resilience backs the caster's light footprint, letting flame serve the warden formation rather than break from it.

Where the Wardens hold the line with blade and buckler, this ranged intelligence-driven fighter channels variable lightning strikes to punish enemies who break formation or press the flanks — arc-wide voltage replacing the arc-wide sword. The unpredictable amplitude of each discharge keeps opponents off-balance, extending the Wardens' broad-front pressure into the middle distance without surrendering their elemental generalism.

Where the Ironfield Wardens press forward on broad fronts, this ranged intellect-channeler hurls variable fire across the contested threshold, adjusting output to punish clustered formations or flush entrenched shadows. The Ashen Verge marks the scorched boundary the Wardens refuse to cede — and this kit holds it at range while the line advances.

Where the Wardens hold the line with iron and wind, this ranged intellect channels variable water flows — surging pressure or measured streams — to erode enemy footholds from distance, keeping elemental breadth in the faction's favor. The Tidecaller reads the battlefield's tempo and adjusts the flood accordingly, flooding gaps the front line cannot reach.

Where the Ironfield Wardens' front line presses forward, the Farwarden holds the exposed ground behind it — reading wind currents across the field to deliver ranged elemental pressure at variable intensity, thinning flanks before they can close. Wisdom over reflex governs each strike, letting the warden calibrate gusts from a measured distance rather than trading blows at the crush.

A ranged warden who channels earth resonance through measured, variable-weight strikes, reading the battlefield's shifting pressure from the rear line before releasing wide-arc force that pins and disrupts in equal measure. Wisdom-driven timing lets this fighter hold the Ironfield line without closing distance, turning ground itself into a weapon of sustained presence.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Warden Sage of the Far Threshold
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A ranged wisdom-bearer who channels holy energy across variable distances, this warden reads the battlefield's shifting pressures and releases wide-arc consecrated volleys that reinforce the Ironfield line from the middle ground. Where the front holds by earthen force, she holds it by reach — sustaining the faction's elemental breadth without ever surrendering ground.
